import { initializeApp } from 'https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.12.0/firebase-app.js'; import { getAuth, onAuthStateChanged, signOut } from 'https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.12.0/firebase-auth.js'; import { getFirestore, doc, setDoc, updateDoc, serverTimestamp } from 'https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.12.0/firebase-firestore.js'; const firebaseConfig = { apiKey: "AIzaSyAV0_Buy_KKD4TSe-1IpByCVoZFoRJQaNE", authDomain: "mho-music-academy.firebaseapp.com", projectId: "mho-music-academy", storageBucket: "mho-music-academy.firebasestorage.app", messagingSenderId: "705322739069", appId: "1:705322739069:web:422b6fd0c7a08ab8921814", measurementId: "G-CF5HDVT6MK" }; const app = initializeApp(firebaseConfig); const auth = getAuth(app); const db = getFirestore(app); async function updatePresence(isOnline, user) { if (!user) return; const userPresenceRef = doc(db, 'presence', user.uid); if (isOnline) { await setDoc(userPresenceRef, { uid: user.uid, email: user.email, displayName: user.displayName || user.email.split('@')[0], photoURL: user.photoURL || null, lastSeen: serverTimestamp(), online: true }, { merge: true }); } else { await updateDoc(userPresenceRef, { online: false, lastSeen: serverTimestamp() }); } } onAuthStateChanged(auth, async (user) => { const authBtn = document.getElementById('authButtons'); const userMnu = document.getElementById('userMenu'); const userName = document.getElementById('userNameText'); const userPic = document.getElementById('userProfilePicture'); const userPlaceholder = document.getElementById('userProfilePicturePlaceholder'); if (user) { if (authBtn) authBtn.classList.add('hidden'); if (userMnu) userMnu.classList.remove('hidden'); if (userName) userName.textContent = user.displayName || user.email.split('@')[0]; if (user.photoURL) { if (userPic) { userPic.src = user.photoURL; userPic.classList.remove('hidden'); } if (userPlaceholder) userPlaceholder.classList.add('hidden'); } await updatePresence(true, user); } else { if (authBtn) authBtn.classList.remove('hidden'); if (userMnu) userMnu.classList.add('hidden'); } }); const logoutBtn = document.getElementById('logoutBtn'); if (logoutBtn) { logoutBtn.addEventListener('click', async () => { const user = auth.currentUser; if (user) await updatePresence(false, user); await signOut(auth); window.location.reload(); }); }
